description: APT33 password spray tool uses go-http-client user-agent via TOR exit nodes. Primary initial access since 2023.
Generic Python requests library - may indicate automated auth attempts. Low confidence without other indicators.
More than 20 unique target accounts from single source in 1 hour = password spray. APT33 signature pattern.
More than 50 failures to single account from single source = brute force.
Iranian business hours (UTC+3:30 = 08:00-16:00 IRST). Authentication activity clustering in this window from unknown sources may indicate Iranian APT operations.
Extended Iranian working hours including late-shift operations.
MuddyWater documented use of NordVPN for operational anonymisation (Group-IB confirmed Aug 2025).
